name: multi-edit
description: Apply edits (replace, insert, delete, append, prepend, pairs, or inline Python transforms) to a file in one step, with --cd to change directory, --stdin for multi-line replacements, --stdin-code for stdin-based Python transforms, and insert-before-next to insert text before the next non-blank/non-comment line after a matching pattern.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: Path to the file to edit

parameters.name: old_or_pattern
parameters.description: Old text (for replace) or search pattern (for insert/delete)

parameters.name: new_text
parameters.description: New text (for replace) or text to insert (for insert/append/prepend)

parameters.name: --cd=DIR, -C DIR
parameters.description: Change to DIR before editing (replaces cd + edit pattern)

parameters.name: --pairs
parameters.description: Perform multiple old/new replacements in one call

parameters.name: --code
parameters.description: Inline Python transform code that receives 'content' and 'filepath' variables

parameters.name: --stdin
parameters.description: Read old/new text from stdin (separated by blank line or ---DELIM---)

parameters.name: --stdin-code
parameters.description: Read Python transform from stdin instead of as argument

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces inline Python edit scripts (heredocs or python3 -c) with one step, reducing tool call characters and step count; --stdin-code matches python3 << PYEOF pattern exactly; --cd replaces cd + edit two-step pattern; insert-before-next replaces the common 'find-pattern-then-insert-before-next-line' Python heredoc pattern.
